packet.topic: Minimalist camping gear setup in nature
packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Wide aspect ratio ideal for outdoor gear marketing, travel blogs, and adventure lifestyle banners showcasing natural surroundings and camping setup.
packet.positive_prompt: Neatly arranged minimalist campsite with simple tent, portable camping stove, backpack, natural forest background with pine trees and rocks, clear daylight or golden hour lighting, earthy color tones, no people, no branded gear, no logos or copyrighted designs
packet.negative_prompt: Branded outdoor gear, visible logos, people, text, watermarks, editorial or news scenes, copyrighted designs, public figures
packet.technical_specs: Natural daylight or golden hour lighting, sharp focus on camping gear and nature elements, earthy tones
